input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.4.2.12 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.4.2.12
            TITLE: the current rules are written to only apply to the apps (pedal), but the integrity of the torque

            CONTENT:
            rule T.4.2.12: The current rules are written to only apply to the APPS (pedal), but the integrity of the torque
T.4.2.12 The current rules are written to only apply to the APPS (pedal), but the integrity of the torque 
command signal is important in all stages.

final_answer: rule T.4.2.12: The current rules are written to only apply to the APPS (pedal), but the integrity of the torque command signal is important in all stages.
